name: AX120_DIGITAL
$comment: LED index maps and wire-remap tables derived from https://github.com/Lexonight1/thermalright-trcc-linux
comment: 30 LEDs, one 3-digit 7-segment field plus unit + source indicators. Firmware default cycles CPU/GPU temp+load; here the render engine rotates whatever tiles you point at slot 'main'. No wire remap (identity).
